chapter_title: Civil Liability of Owners and Operators of Vehicles
text: As used in this chapter, “nonresident” means a person who is not a resident of this State at the time the accident or collision occurs.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 9. CIVIL LIABILITY [17000 - 17714]
### Chapter 1. Civil Liability of Owners and Operators of Vehicles [17000 - 17463]
#### Article 4. Service of Process [17450 - 17463]
##### § 17450

As used in this chapter, “nonresident” means a person who is not a resident of this State at the time the accident or collision occurs.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: As used in this chapter, “nonresident” means a person who is not a resident of this State at the time the accident or collision occurs.
